Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description:
At Quadient, we support businesses of all sizes in their digital transformation and growth journey, unlocking operational efficiency with reliable, secure, and sustainable automation processes. Our success in delivering innovation and business growth is inspired by the connections our diverse teams create every day, with our clients and each other. It’s these connections that make Quadient such an exceptional place to grow your career, develop your skills and make a real impact – help our future-focused business lead the way in powering secure and sustainable business connections through digital and physical channels.

Job Description

We are currently looking for a Junior Data Analyst, who will support the eCommerce team. What will you be doing?


Deliver regular reporting (daily, weekly, monthly) to support eCommerce, demand generation, and sales development teams
Prepare, clean, and manage prospect and performance data across systems (CRM, analytics tools)
Ensure data accuracy, validation, and quality across reporting and dashboards
Extract and analyze data from tools like Google Analytics, Data Lake, and Tableau
Support CRM data uploads and maintain data hygiene standards
Contribute to dashboard development and reporting improvements
Assist with ad hoc analysis and data requests from cross-functional teams
Document data processes, workflows, and reporting logic


Qualifications


Strong analytical mindset with high attention to detail
Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, pivot tables, data validation) and MS Access
Ability to work with and prepare data in CRM and marketing platforms (Salesforce is an advantage)
Exposure to BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker) or basic SQL is also an advantage
Basic understanding of marketing, demand generation, or eCommerce metrics
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage recurring tasks and deadlines
Clear communication skills (written and verbal) for documenting and explaining data
Curiosity and willingness to learn new tools and data concepts
Flexibility and willingness to occasionally work late afternoon, because your manager is based in Canada


Additional Information

Rewards & Benefits


Flexible Work: Embrace a hybrid work model blending office and remote setup for a balanced lifestyle.
Endless Learning: Access global opportunities for growth through our 24/7 online learning platform.
Inclusive Community: Join our Empowered Communities and engage in our Philanthropy program.
Comprehensive Rewards: Enjoy competitive Total Rewards covering wellness, work/life balance, and more, including a generous referral scheme.
Caring for Wellbeing: Access our complimentary employee assistance program for mental health support.


Smart Work at Quadient

At Quadient, our Smart Work approach fosters connection, collaboration, and innovation while offering flexibility based on role requirements. Whether on-site, hybrid, or remote, our work environments are designed to support productivity and engagement. Hybrid employees balance remote and in-office work, on-site roles contribute daily to our vibrant workplace culture, and remote employees stay connected through virtual collaboration and in-person events. No matter where you work, you’ll be part of a dynamic, people-first community that drives success together.

Be yourself at Quadient

Our values define how we work as a team: Empowerment, Passion, Inspiration and Community. They inspire us to be EPIC. Together. What makes Quadient different is how different we are. We’re a team of individuals with one goal but many perspectives. Job Description

We are currently looking for a Junior Data Analyst, who will support the eCommerce team. What will you be doing?

  • Deliver regular reporting (daily, weekly, monthly) to support eCommerce, demand generation, and sales development teams
  • Prepare, clean, and manage prospect and performance data across systems (CRM, analytics tools)
  • Ensure data accuracy, validation, and quality across reporting and dashboards
  • Extract and analyze data from tools like Google Analytics, Data Lake, and Tableau
  • Support CRM data uploads and maintain data hygiene standards
  • Contribute to dashboard development and reporting improvements
  • Assist with ad hoc analysis and data requests from cross-functional teams
  • Document data processes, workflows, and reporting logic

Qualifications

  • Strong analytical mindset with high attention to detail
  • Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, pivot tables, data validation) and MS Access
  • Ability to work with and prepare data in CRM and marketing platforms (Salesforce is an advantage)
  • Exposure to BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker) or basic SQL is also an advantage
  • Basic understanding of marketing, demand generation, or eCommerce metrics
  • Strong organizational skills and ability to manage recurring tasks and deadlines
  • Clear communication skills (written and verbal) for documenting and explaining data
  • Curiosity and willingness to learn new tools and data concepts
  • Flexibility and willingness to occasionally work late afternoon, because your manager is based in Canada

  • Flexible Work: Embrace a hybrid work model blending office and remote setup for a balanced lifestyle.
  • Endless Learning: Access global opportunities for growth through our 24/7 online learning platform.
  • Inclusive Community: Join our Empowered Communities and engage in our Philanthropy program.

  • Caring for Wellbeing: Access our complimentary employee assistance program for mental health support.

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description:
About us – Wewo Telecommunication Italy S.r.l.




Wewo Telecommunication Italy S.r.l. is part of the international Vivo group, a global leader in the production of smartphones and smart devices.

In Italy, we collaborate with major retail and distribution partners, delivering innovative technologies within a dynamic and international environment.




The Role




We are looking for a motivated and analytical Junior Data Analyst to support business performance monitoring and data-driven decision-making across the organization.

The role will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data from multiple sources to provide actionable insights and support business stakeholders. The Junior Data Analyst will work closely with Retail, Sales, Marketing, GTM, and Finance teams to monitor key performance indicators, sales trends, stock levels, promotional activities, and overall business performance.

This position has a direct impact on reporting accuracy, business planning, operational efficiency, and the identification of opportunities to improve retail performance and commercial results in Italy.




Main Responsibilities




Collect, clean, and analyze data from multiple sources.
Prepare recurring and ad-hoc reports for business stakeholders.
Monitor retail business performance indicators and support KPI tracking.
Analyze sell-in and sell-out performance across retail channels.
Track sales performance by product, model, retailer, region, and promoter.
Monitor stock levels, inventory aging, product availability, and replenishment trends.
Support retail visibility and merchandising performance analysis.
Develop dashboards and data visualizations.
Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities through data analysis.
Support forecasting and business planning activities.
Collaborate with Retail, Sales, Marketing, GTM, and Finance teams.
Monitor promotional campaign performance and support ROI analysis.
Ensure data accuracy and consistency across reports and systems.
Assist in process automation and reporting optimization initiatives.




Requirements




Bachelor's Degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Engineering, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or related fields.
1-2 years of experience in Data Analysis, Business Analysis, Reporting, or similar roles.
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, Power Query, advanced formulas).
Good knowledge of Power BI, Tableau, or similar Business Intelligence tools.
Basic knowledge of SQL.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Attention to detail and data accuracy.
Good communication and presentation skills.
Fluent Italian and good English communication skills.




Preferred Qualifications




Experience with Power BI dashboard development.
Knowledge of Python or R for data analysis.
Experience working with large datasets.
Understanding of retail, sales, and commercial KPIs.
Experience in consumer electronics, retail, FMCG, or telecommunications industries.
Knowledge of sell-in, sell-out, stock management, and retail performance metrics.




What We Offer




International and dynamic working environment.
Opportunity to work closely with Retail, Sales, GTM, Marketing, and Finance teams.
Professional growth and development opportunities.
Training and mentoring support.
Exposure to business-critical projects and decision-making processes.
Fixed-term contract (12 months) with possibility of extension based on business needs.
On-site working environment.




Salary Range




RAL: €25,000 - €28,000 based on experience and skills.

Experiencia con Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric y flujos de datos.
Modelado y visualización de datos.

Title: Data Analyst (H/F)
Description:
L'assurance Maladie de l'Eure (CPAM) recherche 1 Data Analyst (H/F) dans le cadre d'un CDI à pourvoir sur notre site d'Evreux.

Au sein de la Direction du pilotage des moyens et des ressources, le service Pilotage de la Performance et Analyse des Données est composé de 2 statisticiens, d'un manager d'activité également contrôleur de gestion et d'un manager stratégique.

En tant que Data Analyst, vous serez chargé de concevoir et déployer des solutions informatiques innovantes (ex: visualisation, automatisation), ainsi que de mettre en œuvre, en collaboration avec l'équipe de statisticiens, des méthodes d'analyse de données avancées. Vous serez affecté sur des projets transverses, avec une dominante sur les domaines du contrôle de gestion et la lutte contrôle la fraude. Vos travaux permettront :


D'automatiser et sécuriser la production et l'analyse de données,
D'éclairer les décisions de pilotage de la CPAM,
De renforcer l'efficacité des dispositifs de lutte contre la fraude.


Vos Missions


Développer et améliorer les outils (automatisation, application, etc.)
Appliquer des règles de nettoyage et de structuration des données, s'assurer de la cohérence des données multi-sources,
Accompagner les managers / pilotes de processus dans la compréhension et le pilotage de leurs indicateurs (modalités de calcul, outils de suivi, élaboration d'un plan d'action, etc.),
Participer aux travaux sur l'adéquation charges/ressources par la collecte et l'analyse de données,
Participer au déploiement et au suivi des objectifs contractualisés entre la CNAM et la CPAM,
Élaborer et adapter des guides méthodologiques,
Clarifier et analyser les demandes (étude, analyse statistiques, extraction de données) et proposer une méthodologie adaptée
Adapter et construire des outils de reporting ou de pilotage (automatisation de traitements via Power Query, Power BI, VBA et restitution/mise en forme),
Réaliser des requêtes sur les bases (SQL), exploiter les données, en produire des analyses, des synthèses,
Contribuer à la fiabilisation et à la remontée des données à la CNAM,
Assurer une fonction de support/conseil dans son domaine,
Assurer une veille dans son domaine d'expertise.


Le candidat retenu devra se conformer aux exigences de la Politique de Sécurité des Systèmes d'Information de l'organisme et sera tenu au secret professionnel.

Ce poste est à pourvoir sur notre site d'Evreux dans le cadre d'un contrat de 39h par semaine du lundi au vendredi.

Formation : Diplôme égal ou supérieur au Bac +3 dans le domaine du traitement, de l'analyse de données, exigé.

Compétences : Maîtrise impérative de Power Query, Power BI et SQL. Vous êtes reconnu pour votre esprit collaboratif, votre rigueur, votre capacité d'analyse, vos qualités pédagogiques et facultés d'adaptation. Lors de votre prise de fonction, vous serez accompagné par un parcours d'intégration comportant formations, immersions et parrainage.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
En Carrefour estamos transformando nuestros sistemas centrales para modernizar nuestra actividad principal, el comercio al por menor.




Si quieres ser parte de una empresa dinámica, dentro de un sector con gran potencial de desarrollo que te ofrecerá oportunidades de crecimiento profesional y personal, nos encantará tener la oportunidad de conocerte.




Buscamos un/una Data Analyst para nuestra dirección de seguros con el objetivo de análizar los datos de la compañía con eje cliente através de la minería de los datos a partir de distintas fuentes y sobre un entorno Big Data y con el objetivo de transformarlos en información accionable para la compañía y proveer a la Compañia de informes y visualizaciones de datos útiles para la toma de decisiones. Discriminar y separar los datos para ofrecer información relevante a sus clientes. Potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de




La posición debe potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de Negocio.




Entre sus funciones principales se encuentran:




-Tener una visión clara de negocio con el fin de ayudar a las unidades de negocio a mejorar su toma de decisiones con respecto al cliente.

- Ofrecer una visualización de los datos que permita su mejor entendimiento por sus clientes.

- Aportar análisis cuantitativos basados en el histórico de datos internos de los clientes para ofrecer previsiones de comportamiento del mismo a Negocio, con el objetivo de ajustar los esfuerzos comerciales a la tendencia del cliente Realizar aportes de valor a las unidades de negocio orientado a la mejora de las decisiones que se adopten.

- Análisis e interpretación de los resultados a partir de distintas técnicas avanzadas (regresiones, algoritmos matemáticos avanzados…) y de herramientas analíticas para detectar las causas raíz de problemas de áreas de negocio .







Nos encantaría conocerte si cuentas con:




-Titulación de Ingeniero Superior, Matemático o Estadístico.

-Experiencia de 2 años en puestos similares.

-Ingles nivel medio-alto.

-Bases Datos SQL y Data Mining.







¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Contrato indefinido

Salario competitivo (fijo + variable)

Descuento del 8% para ti y para 6 personas más en nuestras tiendas

En Carrefour estamos transformando nuestros sistemas centrales para modernizar nuestra actividad principal, el comercio al por menor.


Si quieres ser parte de una empresa dinámica, dentro de un sector con gran potencial de desarrollo que te ofrecerá oportunidades de crecimiento profesional y personal, nos encantará tener la oportunidad de conocerte.


Buscamos un/una Data Analyst para nuestra dirección de seguros con el objetivo de análizar los datos de la compañía con eje cliente através de la minería de los datos a partir de distintas fuentes y sobre un entorno Big Data y con el objetivo de transformarlos en información accionable para la compañía y proveer a la Compañia de informes y visualizaciones de datos útiles para la toma de decisiones. Discriminar y separar los datos para ofrecer información relevante a sus clientes. Potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de


La posición debe potenciar e impulsar nuevos planteamientos de análisis orientados al cliente con el objetivo de realizar aportaciones de valor a las Unidades de Negocio.


Entre sus funciones principales se encuentran:


-Tener una visión clara de negocio con el fin de ayudar a las unidades de negocio a mejorar su toma de decisiones con respecto al cliente.

- Ofrecer una visualización de los datos que permita su mejor entendimiento por sus clientes.

- Aportar análisis cuantitativos basados en el histórico de datos internos de los clientes para ofrecer previsiones de comportamiento del mismo a Negocio, con el objetivo de ajustar los esfuerzos comerciales a la tendencia del cliente Realizar aportes de valor a las unidades de negocio orientado a la mejora de las decisiones que se adopten.

- Análisis e interpretación de los resultados a partir de distintas técnicas avanzadas (regresiones, algoritmos matemáticos avanzados…) y de herramientas analíticas para detectar las causas raíz de problemas de áreas de negocio .



Nos encantaría conocerte si cuentas con:


-Titulación de Ingeniero Superior, Matemático o Estadístico.

-Experiencia de 2 años en puestos similares.

-Ingles nivel medio-alto.

-Bases Datos SQL y Data Mining.

Title: Data Analyst H/F
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?

Althéa est un cabinet de conseil spécialisé dans la transformation des fonctions RH, SIRH et Finance. Dans le cadre du développement de notre activité d'externalisation de la gestion de la maladie, nous renforçons nos équipes et recherchons un(e) Data Analyst pour accompagner notre croissance et contribuer à l'amélioration continue de nos services.

Votre mission :

Rattaché(e) au Responsable du service Externalisation de la Gestion de la Maladie, vous jouez un rôle clé dans l'exploitation, l'analyse et la valorisation des données afin d'accompagner la prise de décision et l'optimisation de nos processus.

À ce titre, vos principales missions seront :

-Collecter, centraliser et stocker les données.

-Contrôler et fiabiliser les données (détection des erreurs, doublons et données manquantes).

-Structurer et organiser les données pour faciliter leur exploitation.

-Réaliser des analyses et identifier des tendances.

-Concevoir des reportings et tableaux de bord à destination des équipes et des décideurs.

-Participer à l'amélioration continue des processus et outils.









Selon le profil et les appétences du candidat, le poste évoluera sur d’autres tâches

:-AMOA : en charge de retranscrire auprès de nos équipes de développement les améliorations à apporter à nos outils. Améliorations que vous aurez trouvées ou qui auront été remontées par les équipe

Title: Alternance - Data Analyst
Description:
Seuls les candidats intéressés par une formation chez Ironhack pourront être présentés à notre partenaire et bénéficier de notre système de coaching/matching. Pas de frais à prévoir pour le candidat retenu.




Ironhack recherche un.e Data Analyst en Alternance pour une de ses entreprises partenaires, un leader du e-commerce et des services digitaux.




Principales missions

Collecter, organiser et fiabiliser des données provenant de différentes sources

Analyser les données afin d’identifier des tendances et produire des recommandations stratégiques

Concevoir et mettre à jour des tableaux de bord et reportings pour les équipes opérationnelles

Réaliser des extractions et manipulations de données via SQL

Participer au suivi des indicateurs de performance (KPI) et à l’optimisation des processus

Collaborer avec les équipes marketing, produit et business pour répondre aux besoins d’analyse

Contribuer à l’automatisation de certains reportings et à l’amélioration des outils de suivi







Profil recherché

Tu as un intérêt marqué pour la data, les analyses et la compréhension des enjeux business

Tu apprécies travailler avec les chiffres et interpréter des données

Tu fais preuve de rigueur, d’organisation et d’esprit analytique

Tu es curieux.se, autonome et motivé.e à apprendre de nouveaux outils

Tu apprécies le travail en équipe et les environnements dynamiques

Tu possèdes idéalement des bases en SQL, Excel, Google Sheets ou outils de data visualisation (Power BI, Tableau…)




Pour acquérir l'ensemble de ces compétences, vous bénéficiez pour cela d’une formation accélérée (3 mois) suivie d’une année d’alternance chez Ironhack, un acteur majeur de le la formation dans la Tech depuis plus de 10 ans.




Conditions

Contrat d’apprentissage

Rémunération : Grille officielle Alternance

Localisation : Levallois-Perret (92)

Title: Data Analyst (Product)
Description:
About Revolut




People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 70+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth, 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. So far, we have 13,000+ people working around the world, from our offices and remotely, to help us achieve our mission. And we're looking for more brilliant people. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.




About the role




Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Analysts and Scientists work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a talented Data Analyst to dig into our complex databases, look for root causes of a problem, design your own solutions, and write your own code to implement them. We aim for you to never stop learning, picking up new skills and delivering value along the way.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.




What you'll be doing




Understanding our business and its processes through our data
Applying this understanding and knowledge of data to help product and service teams
Designing key metrics to measure different aspects of the business
Creating and maintaining new aggregated views and tables to simplify data querying
Maintaining and creating new dashboards to track metrics and visualise insights
Promoting data literacy across the company, organising and holding workshops




What you'll need




Previous experience in an analytical role creating impactful solutions
A background/education in a quantitative discipline
3+ years of experience with SQL
Great skills with Python or other programming languages
Evidence of solid mathematical and statistics knowledge







Building a global financial super app isn’t enough. Our Revoluters are a priority, and that’s why in 2021 we launched our inaugural D&I Framework, designed to help us thrive and grow everyday. We're not just doing this because it's the right thing to do. We’re doing it because we know that seeking out diverse talent and creating an inclusive workplace is the way to create exceptional, innovative products and services for our customers. That’s why we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and experiences to join this multicultural, hard-working team.




Important notice for candidates:

Job scams are on the rise. Please keep these guidelines in mind when applying for any open roles.

• Only apply through official Revolut channels. We don’t use any third-party services or platforms for our recruitment.

• Always double-check the emails you receive. Make sure all communications are being done through official Revolut emails, with an @revolut.com domain.

We won't ask for payment or personal financial information during the hiring process. If anyone does ask you for this, it’s a scam. Report it immediately.

By submitting this application, I confirm that all the information given by me in this application for employment and any additional documents attached hereto are true to the best of my knowledge and that I have not wilfully suppressed any material fact. I confirm I have disclosed if applicable any previous employment with Revolut. I accept that if any of the information given by me in this application is in any way false or incorrect, my application may be rejected, any offer of employment may be withdrawn or my employment with Revolut may be terminated summarily or I may be dismissed. By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be processed in accordance with Revolut's Candidate Privacy Notice

The ideal candidate will use their passion for big data and analytics to provide insights to the business covering a range of topics. They will be responsible for conducting both recurring and ad hoc analysis for business users.

Title: Medior Data Analist
Description:
Ben jij een Medior Data Analist die energie krijgt van het analyseren van data en het vertalen van cijfers naar concrete inzichten? Deze organisatie biedt jou de kans om een essentiële rol te spelen binnen Portfolio Management, waar je samenwerkt met collega's, stakeholders en volmachtgevers om betrouwbare rapportages en waardevolle inzichten te leveren. Je combineert analytisch vermogen met een scherp oog voor kwaliteit, processen en verbetering. Hier krijg je volop ruimte om initiatief te nemen, jezelf te ontwikkelen via opleidingen en cursussen, en mee te bouwen aan slimmere processen en sterkere inzichten. De informele sfeer, korte lijnen en behulpzame collega's zorgen ervoor dat je snel kunt schakelen en impact kunt maken. Bovendien kun je deels vanuit huis werken, sport je onder werktijd met collega's, ontvang je een laptop en telefoon van de zaak en geniet je van een gezellig High Performance team!

Omschrijving

Wat je gaat doen:

Als Medior Data Analist ben jij verantwoordelijk voor het vertalen van informatievragen naar heldere analyses die direct bijdragen aan betere besluitvorming binnen Portfolio Management. Je analyseert dagelijks verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken. Door intensief gebruik te maken van Excel en FrameStory stel je rapportages op die zowel interne als externe stakeholders voorzien van betrouwbare informatie. Je stemt regelmatig af met verschillende afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims om processen te optimaliseren. Daarnaast lever je verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers, denk je mee over procesverbeteringen, verbeter je datakwaliteit binnen FrameStory én zorg je ervoor dat complexe informatie begrijpelijk wordt gemaakt voor de business. Samenwerken in een team waar kennisdeling centraal staat is hierbij essentieel.

Je vertaalt informatievragen naar duidelijke analyses en rapportages waarmee collega's echt verder kunnen.
Je werkt dagelijks met verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken voor de business.
Je gebruikt Excel en FrameStory intensief om data te analyseren en rapportages op te stellen die stakeholders ondersteunen bij besluitvorming.
Je zorgt voor correcte en tijdige informatieverstrekking richting interne afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims én externe stakeholders.
Je levert verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers zodat zij beschikken over actuele inzichten.
Je stemt af met verschillende afdelingen binnen de organisatie om processen te optimaliseren en efficiënter te laten verlopen.
Je denkt actief mee over procesverbeteringen en draagt bij aan het verbeteren van datakwaliteit
Je maakt complexe informatie begrijpelijk en bruikbaar voor de business door deze helder uit te leggen aan collega's.
Je werkt samen in een dynamisch team waar inhoudelijke sparring centraal staat en waar kennisdeling wordt gestimuleerd.

Wat je meeneemt:

Jouw analytisch vermogen stelt jou in staat om complexe data-vraagstukken snel te doorgronden en deze om te zetten naar concrete inzichten die collega's verder helpen. Met jouw afgeronde wo-opleiding in bijvoorbeeld wiskunde of bedrijfseconomie beschik jij over de juiste theoretische achtergrond om diepgaande analyses uit te voeren. Minimaal één jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare functie zorgt ervoor dat jij gewend bent om zelfstandig én gestructureerd te werken. Je bent communicatief vaardig waardoor jij ingewikkelde materie helder weet uit te leggen aan collega's uit verschillende disciplines. Jouw kennis van MS Office - vooral Excel - maakt dat jij efficiënt data kunt verwerken. Je vindt het prettig om samen te werken met anderen; inhoudelijk sparren met collega's geeft jou energie. Daarnaast ben jij stressbestendig: ook wanneer er veel tegelijk speelt weet jij het overzicht te bewaren. Affiniteit of ervaring binnen de verzekeringsbranche is mooi meegenomen maar geen must; jouw leergierigheid zorgt ervoor dat jij snel nieuwe kennis oppikt.

Je hebt een afgeronde wo-opleiding waardoor je beschikt over sterke analytische vaardigheden.
Je hebt minimaal één jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare analytische functie waardoor je gewend bent om complexe vraagstukken uit te zoeken.
Je hebt goede kennis van MS Office, met name Excel waarmee je data efficiënt kunt analyseren.
Je werkt zelfstandig en gestructureerd zodat je overzicht houdt in uiteenlopende werkzaamheden.
Je bent communicatief sterk waardoor je complexe informatie helder kunt uitleggen aan collega's uit verschillende afdelingen.
Je vindt het leuk om inhoudelijk te sparren met collega's wat bijdraagt aan gezamenlijke oplossingen.
Je beheerst Nederlands én Engels uitstekend zowel mondeling als schriftelijk zodat je effectief kunt communiceren met diverse stakeholders.
Je bent stressbestendig waardoor je makkelijk schakelt tussen verschillende werkzaamheden zonder het overzicht te verliezen.
Ervaring binnen de verzekeringsbranche is een pré maar geen vereiste; affiniteit met deze sector helpt wel bij het begrijpen van de context.

Wat onderscheidt dit bedrijf:

Deze organisatie verzekert complexe risico's voor bedrijven met specialistische kennis. De groei is hard, zowel nationaal als internationaal, waarbij continu wordt gebouwd aan slimmere processen, betere data én sterkere inzichten. Je komt terecht in een omgeving waar jouw inbreng gewaardeerd wordt: hier krijg jij veel ruimte om impact te maken op de verdere groei van de organisatie. De bedrijfscultuur kenmerkt zich door korte lijnen, informele sfeer én collegialiteit; goede ideeën verdwijnen niet in een la maar krijgen daadwerkelijk aandacht. Collega's helpen elkaar graag verder waardoor jij altijd kunt rekenen op support bij inhoudelijke vraagstukken of procesverbeteringen. Initiatief nemen wordt gestimuleerd: jouw bijdrage aan slimmere processen of betere rapportages wordt gezien én gewaardeerd. Naast inhoudelijke uitdaging biedt deze werkgever uitstekende arbeidsvoorwaarden. De locatie is in hartje Rotterdam.

Wat is het volgende:

Ben jij enthousiast geworden over deze rol als Medior Data Analist? Grijp dan nu jouw kans om impact te maken binnen Portfolio Management!




This role is managed by Walters People B.V., trading under the name Robert Walters.

Title: Data Analyst - Compensação e Benefícios
HTML:
A TUA MISSÃO

Queres usar os teus conhecimentos de Python, Power BI e pensamento crítico para apoiar decisões estratégicas em Compensação e Benefícios?

Na Jerónimo Martins terás um papel chave na análise de dados que sustenta políticas salariais, incentivos e benefícios mais justos e competitivos.Estamos à procura de um(a) Data Analyst para este desafio.


O QUE VAIS FAZER

• Analisar e consolidar dados de compensação e benefícios, assegurando informação rigorosa e fiável;

• Desenvolver dashboards e relatórios em Power BI e Excel, suportados por modelação, análise e automatização de dados em SQL e Python;

• Monitorizar KPIs de remuneração e benefícios, identificando tendências, riscos e oportunidades de melhoria;

• Apoiar a equipa na revisão, melhoria e automatização de processos, reforçando a eficiência e a consistência;

• Assegurar a confidencialidade e integridade dos dados em todas as análises e entregáveis.


O TEU PERFIL

• Licenciatura em Sistemas de Informação, Engenharia, Estatística, RH, Gestão ou similar;

• Mínimo 2 anos de experiência em análise e ciência de dados, idealmente em grandes organizações;

• Capacidade analítica, atenção ao detalhe e pensamento crítico;

• Conhecimentos obrigatórios em Excel, Power BI e linguagem de programação (preferencial SQL e Python);

• Boa comunicação e adaptação a diferentes públicos, colaborativo, autónomo e responsável;

• Proatividade em ambientes dinâmicos com foco em resultados.


QUEM SOMOS E O QUE PODES ESPERAR DE NÓS

Porque é que trabalhar connosco é diferente? Porque aqui, as pessoas estão no centro de tudo o que fazemos. Ao integrares a nossa equipa terás acesso a:

  • 22 dias de férias + 2 dias*
  • Políticas de compensação competitivas
  • Oportunidades de formação e desenvolvimento
  • Ginásio, cabeleireiro e estética, cantina, clínica médica, nutrição e outras iniciativas de bem estar
  • Iniciativas de apoio familiar, saúde e educação e acesso a protocolos

* mediante cumprimento de critérios de absentismo.

Sabe mais acerca de como é trabalhar no Grupo Jerónimo Martins através do nosso website ou página de LinkedIn.

Title: Data Analyst Trainee
Description:
Sobre o Publicis Groupe,




O Publicis Groupe, o segundo maior grupo de comunicação do mundo, é uma plataforma de soluções que está presente em mais de 100 países e conta com mais de 114.000 colaboradores. Com uma filosofia de trabalho única, conhecida como The Power of One, coloca os clientes no centro, promovendo o crescimento dos seus negócios através de agências criativas como a Publicis, Leo Burnett, Publicis Health, Wysiwyg, Nurun e Digitas, agências de media como a Zenith, Starcom, Spark e Performics, e áreas de conhecimento transversal.




O Publicis Groupe une Criatividade, Tecnologia e Dados, oferecendo uma proposta de valor que liga efetivamente marcas e consumidores.




Estamos à procura de um/a Data & Analytics Trainee para integrar a nossa equipa e apoiar na transformação de dados em insights úteis para o negócio. Nesta função, terás a oportunidade de trabalhar com diferentes fontes de dados, contribuir para a criação de dashboards e relatório. Irás colaborar de perto com várias áreas da empresa, desenvolvendo competências analíticas e uma visão orientada a dados num ambiente dinâmico e de aprendizagem contínua.




Responsabilidades:




Recolha e Limpeza de dados: Auxiliar na extração e tratamento de dados de diferentes fontes. Contacto com provedores de dados para manutenção das fontes de dados.

Reporting: Apoiar na criação e manutenção de dashboards (Power BI, Tableau ou Excel) e outros tipos de relatório.

Análise: Identificar tendências e padrões que ajudem a otimizar processos internos.

Colaboração: Trabalhar em conjunto com as equipas de negócio para perceber as suas necessidades de informação.




Habilitações:




Excel: Domínio sólido de Excel (vlookups, tabelas dinâmicas, etc.).

Pensamento Crítico: Capacidade de questionar os dados e procurar a história por trás dos números.

Línguas: Bom domínio da língua inglesa (escrita e falada).

Valorizamos: Conhecimentos básicos de SQL ou Python e familiaridade com ferramentas de visualização de dados.




Porquê juntar-se a nós?




🚀 Oportunidades de Crescimento: Pode progredir na sua carreira não só através da experiência de trabalhar com grandes clientes, mas também através do acesso a programas de formação locais e globais especializados de acordo com a sua função, abrangendo tanto competências técnicas como soft skills.
📚 Formação online gratuita: Pode aceder a cursos ilimitados dos catálogos LinkedIn Learning e Udemy através da nossa plataforma de inteligência artificial, Marcel.
🥇 Certificações de parceiros: Terá a oportunidade de obter certificações de gigantes da indústria como Meta, Google ou Amazon.
🌍 Trabalhe de qualquer lugar: Teletrabalho até 6 semanas a partir de mais de 100 países com o nosso programa WorkYourWorld.
✨ Equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional: Modelo de trabalho híbrido com 1 dia de home office. Horário de início de trabalho flexível.




No Publicis Groupe, estamos empenhados em criar uma força de trabalho culturalmente diversificada e, por isso, encorajamos vivamente as candidaturas de grupos sub-representados. Estamos empenhados na igualdade de oportunidades e aceitamos candidaturas de todos os indivíduos, independentemente da sua origem. Não discriminamos com base na raça, cor, religião, identidade ou expressão de género, orientação sexual, nacionalidade, idade, deficiência, estado civil ou estatuto de qualquer indivíduo em qualquer grupo ou classe protegida por lei.




Se tiver necessidades de adaptações razoáveis decorrentes de uma deficiência ou condição médica para participar plenamente no processo de recrutamento, fale com o recrutador que o contactar.




Esta oportunidade não oferece apoio à relocalização.

Title: Data Analyst Junior
Description:
Joining Unlimitail means becoming part of the Retail Media revolution — the marketing lever that is transforming advertising by leveraging data and the digital and physical environments of retailers.




With the ambition to become a leader in Europe and Latin America, Unlimitail helps brands deploy powerful Retail Media strategies and supports retailers in developing their own offers through cutting-edge proprietary technology.




At Unlimitail, you’ll be joining a fast-growing company at the crossroads of data, technological innovation, and digital marketing — reinventing the way brands and retailers connect with consumers.




Role Overview :




Within the Analytics team, your mission will be to participate in the development of Unlimitail’s analytics capabilities. Your environment will be millions of transactional data coming from major retailers on the market to analyze and improve the performance of online and offline marketing campaigns.




As we work with both retailers (providing media inventory) and brands (buying media inventory), you will have the opportunity to gain a deep understanding of the retail media ecosystem.




Your Mission :




You will work with different teams (Ad Operations, Marketing, Sales) in different countries on a wide variety of topics:

Perform ecommerce campaigns analysis to provide detailed insights
Conduct end-to-end ad hoc analysis to help retailers best monetize their inventory
Participate in the design and maintenance of databases, using SQL to store and manage data efficiently
Work on automating data analysis and data visualization capabilities
Work on Unlimitail’s customer lifetime value calculation capability
Participate in the development of new, cutting-edge capabilities to create the best retail media products




What we’re looking for :




Master's degree in Data Analysis, business analytics, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field.
First experience in data analysis
Data Analysis: Proven ability to analyze large datasets, identify trends, and extract actionable insights through the use of strong SQL skills for querying and data extraction.
Programming Languages: Python and SQL mandatory, any other is a plus
Data Visualization: previous experience in creating interactive and insightful visualizations, using tools like Looker is mandatory
Knowledge of GCP environment is a plus
Problem-solving: Adept in approaching analytical problems and proposing effective solutions.
Good communication skills in English. Another language (Spanish, Portuguese) is a plus.
Strong team player with the ability to collaborate effectively




Salary range: €40k - €45k (commensurate with profile)




What’s in it for you :




Work in a fast-paced, international, and innovative environment, at the intersection of data, retail, and media – one of the fastest-growing spaces in digital
A strategic role in a high-growth team with autonomy and impact
A dynamic, supportive environment with smart people and bold ambitions
Office located in the heart of Paris (Sentier district)
A flexible remote work policy of 2 days/week
90% reimbursement of public transportation
10€/day Swile card for each working day, we'll cover 60% of the cost




Ready to make a big impact? Apply now and be part of our innovative journey!

Unlimitail is committed to fostering a diverse workforce and strongly encourages applications from underrepresented groups. We are committed to equality of opportunity and welcome applications from individuals, regardless of their background.

If you have any reasonable adjustment needs arising from a disability or medical condition to fully participate in the recruitment process, please discuss this with the recruiter who contacts you.

  • A strategic role in a high-growth team with autonomy and impact

  • 90% reimbursement of public transportation
  • 10€/day Swile card for each working day, we'll cover 60% of the cost

Title: Analista de dados
HTML:
O FC Porto está à procura de um(a) Analista de Dados orientado(a) para resultados, com gosto pela análise, interpretação e transformação de dados em conhecimento aplicável:


Principais Responsabilidades

  • Recolha, tratamento e análise de dados provenientes de várias fontes;
  • Desenvolvimento de dashboards e relatórios em Power BI;
  • Automatizar processos de análise e reporting;
  • Apoio às equipas internas na interpretação de resultados e indicadores;
  • Identificação de padrões, tendências e oportunidades de melhoria;
  • Contribuir para a tomada de decisão estratégica através de análises claras, rigorosas e orientadas para resultados.


Perfil Pretendido

  • Formação em Estatística, Gestão, Economia, Matemática, Engenharia ou área similar;
  • Domínio de Power BI e capacidade de criação de relatórios interativos;
  • Conhecimentos de R, SQL e Google Analitycs (preferencialmente aplicado à análise, tratamento e visualização de dados);
  • Excel avançado (tabelas dinâmicas, fórmulas complexas, Power Query, etc.);
  • Forte sensibilidade para análise exploratória e preditiva de dados, assim como atenção ao detalhe;
  • Espírito crítico, curiosidade intelectual e orientação para a melhoria contínua;
  • Boa capacidade de comunicação e gosto pelo trabalho colaborativo em equipa.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst - Data Quality, Governance & Access

Are you a data analyst with a strong product mindset and an affinity for data quality? For a major Dutch bank, we are looking for a Data Analyst to join the Customer Data domain within Digital Business Banking. This team provides the capabilities to retrieve, store and validate customer data for both retail and business clients. This data sits at the core of the bank's operations and is used in critical processes such as onboarding, servicing, and regulatory reporting.




About the role

As a Data Analyst, you play a key role in improving and safeguarding the quality of customer data. You combine analytical skills with a product mindset and work closely with stakeholders across the bank.




You will:

Monitor and improve data quality by defining and applying data quality rules and controls
Analyse data issues (e.g. duplicates, missing or incorrect data) and identify root causes across processes and systems
Drive structural improvements by collaborating with upstream and downstream teams
Support consumers of customer data and help them use data effectively
Translate business needs into clear data requirements and user stories
Increase data awareness and promote data quality practices across the organisation

You will take ownership of data quality improvement topics and contribute to prioritisation together with stakeholders across multiple domains.




About you

Strong analytical skills, with decisions based on data and insights
Proficient in SQL and experienced working with large datasets
Hands-on experience with Power BI for building dashboards and visualising insights
Familiar with analytical tools such as Python (pandas) and/or Excel for deeper data analysis
Effective communication with both technical and business stakeholders
Able to translate data into clear, actionable insights that drive impact
Proactive ownership within your domain, driving improvements
Thrives in multidisciplinary, agile teams
Fluent in Dutch and English, both verbal and written
Experience in financial institutions or the banking sector




About Levy Professionals

Since 2000 we provide professional solutions to organizations ranging from tech start-ups to global players. From our offices in Amsterdam and London we have built an international and local network of skilled employed professionals and contractors fuelled by our passion for connecting skills with projects. Over the years we have fulfilled over 2500 requirements and nowadays we consistently have 250+ professionals recruited and relocated from 14 countries allocated to various projects. Our strength is the way that we see and treat people. This will always be a key factor in our strategy for many years to come.

Title: Data Governance Analyst
Description:
The Pepperstone story started in 2010. We know what it's like to trade the world's markets. Our team describes us as a place for the curious and the driven, and we like to do things a little differently; as a transformative global fintech we're digital, nimble, connected, and united in our vision to create a better way to trade.

We thrive on progress - for our clients and for ourselves. Our organisational culture is ever-evolving, vibrant, diverse, global and results focused. You'll find our 700+ team across 12 regions and 9 time zones.



The Role

The Data Governance Analysts plays a hands-on, delivery-focused role in operationalising Pepperstone's Data Governance Framework and Data Quality Framework across Pepperstone. The role is the connective tissue between governance policy and platform execution, translating principles into tagged, classified, well-described and measurably trusted Data Products and Assets across the business.

Using Alation as our governance toolset, the role is responsible for cataloguing and classifying Data Products and Assets, authoring and operationalising semantic Data Quality tests, scheduling and configuring DQ reports, and coordinating the end-to-end resolution of identified Data Quality issues. The role also owns the day-to-day mechanics of Data Product Lifecycle management and review, ensuring our data estate remains fit-for-purpose, compliant and discoverable as it evolves.

The Value Proposition of the role is to lift the trustworthiness, transparency and reusability of Pepperstone's data, directly enabling faster, safer, data-driven decisions across Trading, Risk, Finance, Compliance, Marketing and Client Services in a highly regulated, fast-moving financial services environment.


Key Responsibilities

Contribute to operationalising the Data Governance Framework turning actionable policies, processes, procedures and standards into executed evidenced activity in Alation
Evaluate opportunities and make recommendations for embedding Data Governance practices within IT teams and across the organisation
Use Alation to tag and classify Data Products and Assets (including sensitivity, criticality, ownership, domain, jurisdiction and regulatory context), ensuring consistency with Pepperstone's data classification, privacy and retention standards
Curate and maintain the Enterprise Business Glossary, lineage, and stewardship workflows in Alation so business and technical users can discover, understand and trust our data. 
Drive adoption of governance practices and tooling across Data Stewards, engineering teams and business stakeholders
Operationalise the Data Quality Framework by designing, authoring and maintaining semantic Data Quality tests in Alation
Schedule, configure and tune DQ test execution and reporting on Alation, including run cadence, thresholds, alerting and stakeholder-facing DQ reports and dashboards
Maintain a clear view of open DQ issues, their business impact, root cause and remediation status, and report on trends to the Data Governance & Enablement Manager and broader stakeholders
Coordinate the end-to-end resolution of Data Quality issues identified through DQ test results, stakeholder reports or audits — triaging, prioritising, assigning to the appropriate Data Owners / Stewards / engineering teams, and tracking through to closure
Identify gaps in Data Governance coverage, classification or quality and drive remediation in collaboration with Data Engineering and the relevant business domains
Contribute to the development and maintenance of Data Governance policies, processes, procedures and standards across the relevant jurisdictions in which Pepperstone operates. 
Evaluate opportunities and make recommendations for embedding Data Governance practices within Technology teams and across the organisation. 
Assist the Enterprise Data team in implementing and maintaining tools and processes to ensure compliance with data obligations across jurisdictions. 
Contribute to internal and external audits as required, providing evidence of governance and quality controls operating on the Enterprise Data Platform
Collaborate with business and technical stakeholders to gather and analyse data requirements, ensuring solutions align with business and data governance objectives. 
Develop and maintain comprehensive, consistent documentation for information models, data flows, data dictionaries, the Enterprise Business Glossary and other data artefacts, aligned to industry standards and scalable to business needs. 
Present data artefacts and insights to stakeholders, explaining complex technical concepts clearly and concisely. 
Perform other responsibilities and duties periodically assigned by the manager to meet reasonable operational and/or other requirements.


The role reports to the Data Governance & Enablement Manager in Enterprise Data based in Melbourne.
We support flexible working. This position can be performed from both a mix of at our office and from home. Your manager will share details and expectations of your team's regular cadence of working locations.


About you

Minimum 5 years' experience in data management roles preferably in Financial Services, FX/CFD or FinTech with an understanding of the regulatory and operational risk context typical of regulated brokers
3+ years' experience in a specialist Data Governance role and/ or Data Quality role
Solid understanding of DAMA DMBoK principles or any other relevant data frameworks (i.e. DCAM), and industry best practices. 
Knowledge of global regulatory and compliance frameworks commonly used the in financial services sector (i.e. GDPR, NIST, Australian Privacy Act)
Demonstrated understanding of data governance principles, frameworks, and operating models (data ownership. Stewardship, and accountability models)
Demonstrated experience developing robust data policies, standards, processes and procedures, and translating complex regulatory, compliance and business requirements into clear, actionable artefacts
Familiarity with data retention, data quality, data privacy and data classification implementations
Proficiency in SQL and strong understanding of metadata management for data modelling. 
Hands-on experience with Alation (i.e. catalogue configuration, classification, tagging of Data Products and Assets, stewardship workflows, business glossary management and lineage)
Exposure to authoring Semantic Data Quality tests/rules in Alation, configuring Data Quality Dashboards and co-ordinating the Data Quality Resolution activities
Exposure to Data Product /Data Mesh Operating models and Data Contracts
Exposure to contemporary cloud data-management technology (preferably AWS)
Experience designing and delivering data capability uplift programs, including governance and data literacy training, with measurable improvement in data understanding, adoption, and compliance behaviours across business teams
Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams and facilitating workshops with diverse audiences
Pragmatic and solutions‑oriented professional with strong ownership and accountability, able to operate effectively in ambiguity while demonstrating excellent organisational and prioritisation skills


Why you will enjoy working with us

Competitive salary structure including company bonus scheme
Flexible and hybrid working
Remote working option - work from anywhere for up to 4 weeks per year
10 days of Company paid sick leave annually  
21 days of paid vacation within the first year of employment, increasing to 25 days after one year 
3 paid volunteering days per year & Workplace Giving Program
Comprehensive medical insurance with coverage for your healthcare needs
Pension fund
Employee referral bonuses for referring top talent to the company 
Ongoing personal development & learning opportunities
Periodic recognition and reward programs for outstanding performance and achievements
Frequent events and celebrations
Genuinely collaborative and friendly culture
Employee Assistance Program & Wellbeing Initiatives
Convenient and cozy office located near the Limassol Municipal Garden


More about Pepperstone

We're a regulated online Forex and CFD trading platform. With the scale of a global fintech and the agility of a start-up, we arm our clients with everything they need to take on the global markets with confidence. You will be part of a wider passionate and friendly team, and whilst things may not always go to plan, we learn quickly and move forward with impact. To learn even more visit Pepperstonecareers.com and www.linkedin.com/company/pepperstone/

We understand it's important to do due diligence on a prospective employer, and see what our team is saying on Glassdoor. We respect our team members' experiences and will never pay to remove a negative review.

Pepperstone is an equal-opportunity employer. We are passionate about building a diverse workplace and strongly encourage applications from any background.

"We are a 2025 Circle Back Initiative Employer - we respond to every applicant".

We will be reviewing applications as they come through, so if this is an opportunity that excites you, don't wait. Express your interest by clicking the apply button below as soon as possible.

Note to external agencies: While we appreciate the efforts of external recruitment agencies, we prefer to engage directly with applicants for this opportunity.

Description:
Data Analyst | Amsterdam




Our client is a fast-growing Dutch SaaS company that lets consumers find and buy insurance through a smart app. With roughly 50 people and ambitions to expand across Europe, they're building out the data team that powers every business decision.




What will you be doing?




Build and own the data model that sits underneath every dashboard, report, and analysis in the company.
Set up and maintain data marts so the business always has clean, ready-to-use data at their fingertips.
Own the numbers - from financial close reports to operational updates - and make sure the right people have the right information at the right time.
Dig into the data for Finance and Insurance: spot patterns before anyone asks, agree on what the key metrics mean, and answer the questions that move decisions forward.




Tech stack

SQL · Python · Databricks · QuickSight · AWS




What do you bring?




3–6 years of experience as a data analyst or in a similar role
Strong SQL & Python skills
Python for data transformation and ad-hoc analysis
Hands-on experience with Databricks
Experience building dashboards (QuickSight, Power BI, Tableau or similar)
Comfortable working independently and owning your output




What's in it for you?

€80,000 - €85,000 gross per year, based on experience
Real ownership - small team, visible impact
Working in an environment where things actually get built




What to expect

The role is office-based in Amsterdam (3 days on-site). They operate in a high-performance environment where you'll be expected to work autonomously, get into the detail when needed, and keep up with a team that moves quickly and changes direction when necessary.




Interested and would you like to hear more? Please send me a direct message on either LinkedIn or email me with your most recent CV to: jan@doghouse-recruitment.nl

Title: Ingenieros/as Junior - Programa Sector Medioambiental
Description:
Como referente de la transformación ecológica, en Veolia ofrecemos soluciones para la gestión eficiente de las actividades de agua, residuos y energía, impulsando el desarrollo sostenible de las ciudades, industrias y agricultura.



Trabajamos principalmente en tres grandes áreas: agua💧, ofreciendo soluciones tanto en gestión urbana como industrial; residuos ♻ transformándolos en nuevos recursos, y energía 💡 mejorando la eficiencia y reduciendo el consumo y las emisiones en edificios, industrias y ciudades.





Descripción del empleo



Grow Up Program te ofrece la oportunidad de participar en un programa de desarrollo profesional de 1 año de duración, combinando experiencia práctica en un entorno real y formación teórica que complemente tu desarrollo. Te prepararemos para convertirte en un/a futuro/a profesional clave y generar un gran valor dentro de la compañía. 🚀



Esta experiencia se basará en combinar conocimientos en las operaciones, oficina técnica, así como en el desarrollo de un proyecto final estratégico.



¿Cómo empezaremos? ¡Haciendo una gran bienvenida al programa!



Comenzaremos con una semana de onboarding orientado al conocimiento de los distintos negocios de Veolia mediante visitas a las instalaciones de agua, residuos y energía. Conocerás la estrategia de la compañía de la mano de los/as grandes expertos/as de la compañía, y conocerás a tu mentor/a.



El programa se desarrollará en distintas ubicaciones como Sevilla y Badajoz📍, de tal forma que obtendrás una visión 360° de la línea de negocio de residuos:



Plásticos



Residuos Municipales



Residuos Industriales, Comerciales y Biomasa



Combinarás la formación en las áreas técnicas y de negocio con:



Workshops sobre sostenibilidad y economía circular.



Espacios de networking con líderes senior y expertos/as en sostenibilidad y economía circular.







¿Qué podemos ofrecerte?



Reto profesional con duración de 12 meses centrado en el ámbito de las operaciones y oficina técnica.



Desarrollo de un proyecto final con grandes expertos/as en nuestro sector.



Incorporación en septiembre con contrato indefinido.



Jornada completa.



Ser parte de una organización líder en el sector medioambiental en un momento de grandes retos.



Lo que nos une a los/as empleados/as es la pasión y la excelencia con la que trabajamos cada día para proteger el medio ambiente. Juntos/as, construimos un presente más verde e inclusivo.



¡Si quieres formar parte de este equipo y sumarte a este gran reto, no dudes en postularte!





Requisitos



¿Cuáles serán los requisitos principales para optar al programa?



Ser recién graduados/as en Ingeniería industrial, ambiental, energética, química, civil, forestal o equivalente.



Contar con mínimo 6 meses prácticas - máximo 2 años de experiencia profesional.



Nivel B2 de Inglés.



Disponibilidad para movilidad geográfica.



Buscamos personas apasionadas por la sostenibilidad y el medio ambiente, con mentalidad de crecimiento y aprendizaje continuo, con excelentes habilidades de comunicación y trabajo en equipo, dinámicas y flexibles, orientadas a resultados, con actitud proactiva y disponibilidad para movilidad geográfica.



¿Estás preparado/a? 😊





Información adicional



Como empresa inclusiva, Veolia está comprometida con la diversidad y valora todas las solicitudes sin discriminación.

Title: SECRETARIA / ASISTENTE DE DIRECCIÓN
Description:
Enviar candidatura ahora »

Fecha: 12 jun 2026

Ubicación: MADRID, ES

Empresa: Telefónica

Conectamos el presente. Transformamos el futuro.

¿Alguna vez te has preguntado qué hace posible que millones de personas estén conectadas al mismo tiempo, desde cualquier lugar del mundo, sin que nada falle?

En Telefónica, hacemos que sea posible.

Somos una compañía global de telecomunicaciones y tecnología que conecta a personas, empresas y comunidades a través de redes de última generación y soluciones digitales avanzadas como cloud, inteligencia artificial, IoT o ciberseguridad.

Con una trayectoria de más de 100 años, trabajamos cada día para que la innovación esté al servicio de la sociedad, impulsando una transformación digital responsable, sostenible y con impacto real.

Aquí no solo diseñamos infraestructuras, diseñamos el futuro. Buscamos personas que tengan inquietudes, entusiasmo y pasión por lo que hacen, que no se conformen y que quieran crear la Telefónica del mañana.

Si te apasiona la tecnología que transforma vidas, este es tu lugar.

¿Cuál será tu misión? 🎯

Dar soporte directo y de confianza al/la responsable del área en su gestión diaria, planificación y toma de decisiones, contribuyendo a potenciar la capacidad y el rendimiento del departamento mediante una administración eficiente, discreta y proactiva.

¿Cómo contribuirás con tus capacidades al propósito del rol? 💼

GESTIÓN DE AGENDA Y REUNIONES


Gestión y optimización de la agenda de trabajo del/la responsable del área para maximizar su efectividad y eficiencia.
Convocatoria y coordinación de reuniones y comités recurrentes, asegurando la correcta participación de los asistentes y la disponibilidad de los medios necesarios.
Preparación de documentación de apoyo para reuniones, garantizando que el/la director/a acuda debidamente informado/a.


COMUNICACIONES Y CORRESPONDENCIA


Gestión de llamadas, correos electrónicos y correspondencia, priorizando y canalizando los asuntos con criterio y agilidad.
Seguimiento de las principales actividades del área para anticipar y adaptar cambios de agenda o prioridades.
Interlocución fluida con las principales áreas internas y externas de colaboración, fomentando la cooperación y la calidad de las relaciones interpersonales.


VIAJES Y GASTOS


Organización y gestión de viajes de trabajo (vuelos, hoteles, traslados) de acuerdo con las políticas internas de viajes y seguridad.
Tramitación y seguimiento de notas de gastos y facturas asociadas.


ADMINISTRACIÓN GENERAL


Gestión y archivo de documentación física y electrónica, manteniendo los sistemas de gestión documental actualizados.
Tramitación de facturas de proveedores: alta de proveedores, recepción de órdenes de compra, seguimiento de pagos.
Aprovisionamiento y control de medios materiales para el correcto funcionamiento del área.
Apoyo administrativo general al equipo: preparación de presentaciones, informes y otros documentos según se requiera.
Apoyo transversal al equipo de soporte a proyectos en curso: seguimiento de hitos, coordinación de entrega y gestión documental asociada, dedicando en estas funciones una parte razonable de la jornada según necesidades del área.


¿Qué capacidades buscamos en ti? 🔎


Alta capacidad organizativa, práctica y eficiente.
Gran capacidad de anticipación, flexibilidad y adaptación a entornos de trabajo dinámicos y exigentes.
Discreción, confidencialidad, seriedad y responsabilidad en el manejo de información sensible.
Iniciativa, autonomía y capacidad de decisión para trabajar con supervisión mínima.
Habilidades de comunicación e interpersonales; capacidad para construir relaciones transversales dentro y fuera del equipo.
Capacidad para gestionar picos intensos de trabajo manteniendo la calidad y los plazos.
Orientación al detalle y alta concentración bajo presión.
Imagen profesional y actitud positiva en todo momento.


FORMACIÓN ACADÉMICA


Formación Profesional de Grado Medio o Superior en Administración, Secretariado o similar.
Cursos de Secretariado de Dirección o Asistencia Ejecutiva (valorable).
Grado universitario relacionado (valorable).


EXPERIENCIA

Experiencia en funciones similares de secretariado o asistencia a dirección, preferiblemente en entornos corporativos de gran empresa, se valorará formación específica.

¿Qué otros aspectos son deseables? 📚


Microsoft Office 365 — Nivel avanzado (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
SAP — Valorable.
Herramientas de gestión de agendas y videoconferencia (Teams, Zoom, WebEx).
Familiaridad con herramientas de gestión documental digital y entornos de trabajo corporativo.


IDIOMAS


Español — Bilingüe / Nativo.
Inglés — Nivel alto (spoken and written). Se valorará positivamente.


¿Qué ventajas tendrás por formar parte de nuestro equipo? 💙


Proyectos transformadores. En Telefónica formarás parte de proyectos de alto impacto, que marcan tendencia y responden a los retos de conectividad y transformación digital de nuestra sociedad.
Desarrollo profesional. Tendrás un largo recorrido y aprendizaje a escala global, gracias a nuestra presencia en diferentes geografías. Compartiremos contigo oportunidades de desarrollo, formación y opciones de movilidad. ¡Queremos crecer y construir un futuro contigo!
Flexibilidad. Apostamos por el equilibrio entre la vida profesional y personal. Desde Telefónica cuidamos la flexibilidad, posicionándonos como referente en nuevas formas de trabajo y medidas de conciliación.
27 días laborales de vacaciones para disfrutar.
Beneficios sociales. Podrás disfrutar de un amplio paquete de beneficios sociales entre los que destacan:
Seguro de vida y accidentes
Seguro médico para ti y tu unidad familiar (cónyuge e hijos)
Tarjeta cheques comida
Plan de retribución flexible con numerosas opciones entre las que elegir.
Plan de pensiones


¡Y mucho mas!!

Cuando te unes a Telefónica

Te unes a casi 100 años de historia, un equipo de 106 nacionalidades presentes en más de 35 países. Te unes a un equipo que trabaja por conectar a las personas allá dónde estén, sin fronteras. Un equipo que está liderando la revolución digital con la ilusión del primer día en todos nuestros negocios, creando el mejor ecosistema digital para nuestros clientes: Red, IoT, Cloud, Ciberseguridad, Innovación etc. En Telefónica tienes todo lo que necesitas para crear la mejor versión de ti mismo. Necesitamos gente como tú que se sume a este gran reto, que quiera crear la Telefónica del mañana.

En Telefónica apostamos por las nuevas formas de trabajo y somos líderes en la implementación de la Desconexión Digital bajo el principio “Desconecta para Reconectar”.

Te unes a una compañía cuya actividad se rige por su código ético, Nuestros Principios de Negocio Responsable. Buscamos personas que se identifiquen con los mismos, que nos ayuden a tomar decisiones basadas en la integridad, el compromiso y la transparencia y que se comprometan con una gestión ética, promoviendo un desarrollo social y ambiental más justo y sostenible.

#SomosDiversos

Estamos convencidos de que los equipos diversos e inclusivos son más innovadores, transformadores y consiguen mejores resultados. Por ello promovemos y garantizamos la inclusión de todas las personas sin importar género, edad, orientación e identidad sexual, cultura, discapacidad o cualquier otra condición personal.

Title: OFERTA VACANTE MAESTRO/A TERAPÉUTICA
Description:
Buscamos personas apasionadas por la educación que quieran crecer personal y profesionalmente en un proyecto educativo alegre, profundo, comprometido y transformador. Con vocación docente.

Horas de contrato: 25 hrs. (Jornada completa Contrato Temporal)

Proceso de selección y contratación.

Con las solicitudes recibidas se seguirá el siguiente proceso de selección:

✔ Estudio y selección inicial por parte del Director de Centro y elaboración de la primera selección de candidatos.

✔ Intervención de la Comisión Técnica de Selección y decisión del Titular junto con el Director de Centro.

✔ Publicación del candidato seleccionado.

Plazo de recepción de currículums hasta 16/06/2026.

Requisitos:

Buscamos una persona con la titulación necesaria para impartir docencia en Educación Infantil y/o Primaria.


Diplomatura o Grado universitario de Maestro en Ed. Infantil y/o Primaria.
Especialidad: Pedagogía Terapéutica.


Identidad y compromiso con el proyecto institucional, gestión emocional, responsabilidad, competencias profesionales pedagógicas.

✔ Estudio y selección inicial por parte del Director de Centro y elaboración de la primera selección de candidatos.

✔ Intervención de la Comisión Técnica de Selección y decisión del Titular junto con el Director de Centro.

✔ Publicación del candidato seleccionado.

Plazo de recepción de currículums hasta 16/06/2026.

Requisitos:

Buscamos una persona con la titulación necesaria para impartir docencia en Educación Infantil y/o Primaria.

  • Diplomatura o Grado universitario de Maestro en Ed. Infantil y/o Primaria.
  • Especialidad: Pedagogía Terapéutica.

Identidad y compromiso con el proyecto institucional, gestión emocional, responsabilidad, competencias profesionales pedagógicas.

Title: Associate Operations Analyst
Description:
Helical is building the in-silico labs for biology

Drug discovery still relies on wet labs: slow, expensive, and constrained by physical trial-and-error. Helical is changing that.

We build the application layer that makes Bio Foundation Models usable in real-world drug discovery, enabling pharma and biotech teams to run millions of virtual experiments in days, not years. Today, leading global pharma companies already use Helical, and we're at the start of a highly ambitious growth journey.

We're a founder-led, talent-dense team building a category-defining company from Europe. We care deeply about the quality of our work, move fast, and expect ownership. If you're excited by complexity, real responsibility, and shaping how a company actually operates as it scales, you'll feel at home here.

About The Role

We're hiring an Operations Analyst to build out Helical's AI-first operations machine while we grow at incredible speed. You'll work with state-of-the-art tools and transform how work gets done across the company.

You'll report directly to the Chief of Staff & Operations Lead, own the operating rails (finance, vendors, compliance, people ops, automation), and partner with our fractional CFO on the finance backbone.

We're not hiring someone to do this job the way it has traditionally been done. The right person already thinks in terms of agents, production-grade workflows, and AI-leverage, and uses those tools to multiply what one person can do.

What You'll Do


Build the AI workflows that change how Helical operates - production-grade Claude agents and reusable Skills the whole company depends on day-to-day
Build the automation backbone with Make.com - production-grade workflows the team depends on, not experiments
Work with Helical's fractional CFO and build up the finance backbone of the company
Spot what's broken in our operating rails and fix it before anyone asks — your judgment on what deserves attention is part of the job
Own the new joiner experience end-to-end - make every joiner feel they belong from day one
Lead vendor selection and negotiation end-to-end across the SaaS stack — you walk into the room ready to push back
Design ops processes that scale from a 30-person team to a 100-person team


Currently a student or at the beginning of your career? See our Operations Analyst Internship.

Requirements

Must-haves


Bachelor's degree or equivalent — engineering, finance, biology, or entrepreneurship-related preferred
1 to 3 years of operations experience in a startup (Series Seed to Series B preferred)
Active daily user of Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar AI tools, and of at least one automation platform (Make.com, Zapier, n8n)
Has shipped at least one production automation or AI workflow currently in use
Has owned at least one high-trust workstream end-to-end (SOC 2, ISO, financial close, vendor consolidation, audit, or similar)
Power-user of Notion and Google Drive
Based in London with the right to work in the UK
Obsessed with AI and the impact it's having on how people work. You see it changing the world, and you want to be part of implementing that change in a fast-growing company environment
Strong written communication and execution discipline
Comfortable owning ambiguous work end-to-end
You want to work on AI's impact in biology and drug discovery specifically — not just any AI startup will do


Nice-to-haves


FinOps or finance exposure (you've worked alongside accountants, run AP/AR, or have a finance background)
Light scripting fluency (Python, JSON, low-code platforms)
Biotech, pharma, or scientific context
Show more

Title: Brand Insights Analyst
Description:
About The Role

The Brand Insights Analyst has the mission to deliver insightful data to our high-service customers via the Launchmetrics products and services. Combining advanced industry knowledge (Fashion, Lifestyle & Beauty) with data, the Brand Insights Analyst will build and own customer relationships with the support of his manager, acting as a trusted partner for our customers to provide data driven recommendations and support their initiatives to drive their marketing and communication strategy.

What You’ll Do


Be an expert on platform functions and data to become a strategic advisor for clients, continuously driving value and ROI- connecting their goals to outcomes and developing relationships with multiple stakeholders and customer teams.
Ensure that direct management is up-to-date on clients documentation, reviews, reports, and risk and collaborate with direct managers to prepare regular account reviews with clients to ensure communication around priorities, reporting, data, and platform needs.
Support direct managers for day-to-day tasks linked to accounts with larger revenue while being accountable for its own accounts portfolio of smaller revenue.
Make sure to deliver customers’ reports & analysis on time and ensure that the data delivered to customers is accurate by conducting regular checks and liaising with internal teams to improve queries & data capture.
Proactively act as a timekeeper within its own team to make sure that all customers receive feedback in reasonable timing no matter the type of requests.
Act as the main customer contact for training on the Launchmetrics products, update of customers contacts lists, as well as questions on data/scope of work.
Collect customer needs and share feedback around products, new KPIs and measurement analyses to internal teams, piloting new developments alongside customers.
Identify trends and patterns in datasets to build detailed and insightful reports, utilizing quantitative and qualitative analyses to make recommendations around brand performance.
Build actionable reports to customers, acting as a thought leader to make recommendations around their brand performance.
Be an expert and evangelist of Launchmetrics’ unique measurement methodology.


About You

Who You Are:


Minimum 2 years experience with data analytics
Intermediate Excel skills and appetite for analysis and writing data-driven insights
Strong sense of precision and accuracy
Ability to engage with a wide variety of team members at different levels
Strong relationship building and influencing skills
Demonstrate an ability to adapt to complex and changing environments
Ability to understand customers’ business challenges and needs
Demonstrates innate curiosity and enthusiasm for doing new things in new ways
Deals with issues constructively, seeking effective resolution and swift decision making
Perceptive and sensitive to the needs and motivations of others


We value diverse perspectives and recognize that skills and experiences can be gained in various ways. If you're excited about this opportunity but don't meet every single requirement listed, we would love to hear from you and encourage you to submit an application!

About The Brand Insights Team

We are a team of data consultants, sharing love for data, analysis and building relationships with our customers. We help bring the data to life and make it make sense. Our mission is to empower our customers around their brand & industry performance by interpreting data to deliver insights and actionable analysis.

OUR RECRUITMENT PROCESS


Intro Call
Meet & Greet
Skills Assessment
Culture Fit Interview
Leadership Interview


WHY YOU’LL LOVE LAUNCHMETRICS

We're a company that prioritizes people, fostering a relaxed yet dynamic atmosphere. Our international team is filled with enthusiastic, motivated individuals who enjoy their work. Autonomy empowers our team members, allowing them to make a substantial difference in our business, for our customers, and within our organization. When you become part of our team, you'll have access to growth and advancement possibilities, including a learning and development allowance, a benefits package tailored to each location, and flexible work arrangements, along with support for establishing your home office and other perks.

OUR COMMITMENT

Launchmetrics is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer building a diverse and inclusive workforce. If there is anything extra we can do to help you feel at ease during your interview process, please let the PeopleOps team member you’ll be meeting with know.

Title: DATA ANALYST (F/H) - Randstad professional
Description:
Expectra, leader en France de l'intérim spécialisé et du recrutement en CDI de cadres et agents de maîtrise. Les consultants du Département Aéronautique vous proposent des opportunités de carrière.Nous recherchons pour le compte de notre client, acteur du secteur aérospatial et défense, leader dans la fabrication de satellites, un Data Analyst (F/H) pour une mission d'intérim de 6 mois.Dans le cadre d'un projet de transformation digitale, nous recrutons un Data Analyst (F/H) pour une mission d'intérim de 6 mois basée à Brive-la-Gaillarde. Vos Missions Stratégiques: - Data Management : Collecter, structurer et modéliser les données issues des systèmes industriels (ERP, MES). - Business Intelligence : Concevoir et piloter des dashboards dynamiques sous Power BI pour restituer les KPI métiers. - Architecture Flux : Automatiser les flux de données via ETL (Talend) pour garantir la fiabilité et l'intégrité des informations. - Aide à la Décision : Accompagner les opérationnels dans l'exploitation des données et proposer des solutions d'optimisation innovantes. - Gouvernance : Rédiger la documentation technique et fonctionnelle des modèles déployés.

Profil Recherché - Formation : Ingénieur (Bac+5) ou Master spécialisé en Data / Business Intelligence. - Expérience : Expérience significative en gestion de projets Data (modélisation, traitement et visualisation). - Expertise Métier : Une connaissance approfondie de l'environnement Industriel et/ou de la Supply Chain est indispensable. - Soft Skills : Esprit d'analyse, autonomie et capacité à traduire des enjeux techniques en leviers business. Vous souhaitez intégrer une entreprise dynamique en pleine croissance et jouer un rôle clé dans sa transformation digitale ? Relevez le défi et boostez votre carrière : postulez dès maintenant !
